message:
feat: Implement LoRA Adapter Pool (Liquid Brain Tier 2)

## Phase 1: LoRA Infrastructure Complete

### Task 1.1: Expose llama.cpp LoRA APIs to Zig
- Add LoRA adapter type alias (AdapterLora)
- Bind llama_adapter_lora_init/free functions
- Bind set/remove/clear adapter functions
- Bind metadata access functions
- All functions have proper error handling

### Task 1.2: LoRA Adapter Pool Manager
- Create lora_pool.zig with budget-aware pool management
- LRU eviction when over memory budget
- Thread-safe with mutex protection
- Metadata parsing from GGUF files
- Usage tracking (last_used, usage_count)
- Memory statistics (getStats)

### Task 1.3: Integrate LoRA Pool with Scheduler
- Add lora_pool field to Scheduler struct
- Initialize pool in Scheduler.init() with 1GB budget
- Clean up pool in Scheduler.deinit()
- Ready for adapter selection logic in submit()

## Architecture: Liquid Brain Tier 2
- Tier 1 (Soft Prompt): Prefix cache - Already implemented
- Tier 2 (Hot LoRA): Adapter pool - This commit
- Tier 3 (Cold Archive): LanceQL - Already implemented

## Next Steps
- Add CLI commands for LoRA management
- Implement adapter selection in scheduler.submit()
- Create training documentation
- Add usage-based adapter learning
